issues.description: The Section 2 prose said 'on the 13 in-snippet defects every arm scores 13/13 (only B2 misses D16)', and H1 said path-aware 'lost none' - both overstate strict dominance, since B2 misses the in-snippet defect D16 (H1_context_contrasts.B2_minus_A2_Gemini.lost_vs_routed = ['D16']).
issues.verificationMethod: gpt-5.4 cross-provider review of experiment-a-results.md vs experiment-a-data.json.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Reword to 'no positive in-snippet context gain' rather than strict 13/13 dominance; note B2 misses D16.
issues.resolution_notes: Reworded Section 2 negative-control sentence and the H1 'gained ... lost none' sentence to say there is no in-snippet GAIN (A1/A2/B1 each 13/13; B2 misses D16, lost_vs_routed=[D16]); path-aware is not strictly lossless. The cross-file-concentrated gain is unaffected.

issues.description: The H2 write-up treated context-vs-second-provider as resolved without explicitly tying the pairwise contrast (path-aware-pair - routed-pair = 0.3056) back to the pre-registered noise-band rule.
issues.verificationMethod: gpt-5.4 cross-provider review against the pre-registration H2 'resolved only if exceeds noise band' rule.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: State that +0.3056 is numerically the same resolved gap as B1-A1 and exceeds the band, so H2 is resolved by the same comparison.
issues.resolution_notes: Added a sentence to H2 noting +0.306 equals the B1-A1 gap, exceeds the noise band, and is therefore resolved under the same pre-registered band comparison as H1.

issues.description: Section 5 re-described the pre-registered audit as 'routed x cross-file catches' only, while the pre-registration describes a broader audit procedure (also sampling other matches); restating it more narrowly post-hoc can read like criteria drift.
issues.verificationMethod: gpt-5.4 cross-provider review of Section 5 vs pre-registration Section 5.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Clarify that routed x cross-file were the only score-changing (override-generating) cells, without narrowing the pre-registered procedure.
issues.resolution_notes: Section 5 now states the pre-registration commits to auditing all routed x cross-file catches plus a sample of other matches, and that the only score-changing overrides were in routed x cross-file cells (other inspections produced no overrides).
